title: Icaris Tool and Drive
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Icaris Tool and Drive''' sold parts and industrial intelligence to the [[Sublight Products Corporation|Subpro Corporation]]. Rumors circulated that Icaris had attempted to steal the ''[[Onyx Star]]'' in order to steal the design, but no evidence ever appeared. They later went bankrupt just three years before the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yuuzhan Vong War|War]].

==Appearances==
*{{GamerCite|5|The Crystal|reprint=1}} {{1stm}}
